ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently cited as a top favorite and a masterpiece of horror. Mentioned multiple times for its tension, atmosphere, and rewatchability. Users specifically called it out as a film they'd erase their memory to see again and one they can watch repeatedly.

ranked_movies.title: Alien
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently named as a favorite horror film and one users would choose to experience for the first time again. Praised for its iconic status and blend of sci-fi and horror.

ranked_movies.title: The Shining
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as infinitely re-watchable and a slow-burn horror classic. Users appreciate its dread-inducing atmosphere, finer details, and minimal use of common horror tropes.

ranked_movies.title: Cabin in the Woods
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times as a fun, wacky, and meta horror experience. Suggested for both cheesy horror nights and for viewers who don't typically like horror due to its clever deconstruction of the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Poltergeist
ranked_movies.reason: The original film is mentioned as a rewatchable classic that touches on childhood fears. The sequel is also discussed for its iconic and creepy villain, Reverend Kane.

ranked_movies.title: Scream
ranked_movies.reason: Named as a favorite that introduced many to the horror genre. Praised for its self-awareness and impact, with a specific scene (the mirror trope) being highlighted as well-executed.

ranked_movies.title: Shaun of the Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested as a top-tier comedy-horror and a cheesy, fun watch. Often paired with recommendations like 'Tucker and Dale vs Evil'.

ranked_movies.title: The Descent
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a film so effective it made viewers scream out loud. Also listed as a highly rewatchable horror movie.

ranked_movies.title: 28 Days Later
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a favorite and highly rewatchable film, with users also expressing interest in similar horror TV shows like 'Black Summer'.

ranked_movies.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its great atmosphere and building dread. Specifically chosen by a user as their 'Day 1' horror movie for October.

ranked_movies.title: Tucker and Dale vs Evil
ranked_movies.reason: A top suggestion for cheesy, fun horror. The quote 'These kids are killin themselves all over my property!' was referenced, showing its memorable impact.

ranked_movies.title: Barbarian
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a recent example of a film with a gonzo, unpredictable plot that created a fantastic audience experience for those who went in blind.

ranked_movies.title: The Wailing
ranked_movies.reason: Praised for its suspenseful ending scenes that left viewers riveted. Also chosen by a user as their specific movie for a horror marathon day.

ranked_movies.title: Paranormal Activity
ranked_movies.reason: Noted for the sensation it caused upon release, genuinely scaring viewers and being a top movie-going experience, especially in theaters.

ranked_movies.title: Hellraiser
ranked_movies.reason: The sequel, 'Hellbound', was specifically called out by a user as a film they'd love to erase their memory to experience again, citing a love for it.

ranked_movies.title: Trick 'r Treat
ranked_movies.reason: Described as a warm comforter of fall atmosphere and a highly rewatchable film that is a staple for many during the Halloween season.

ranked_movies.title: Killer Klowns from Outer Space
ranked_movies.reason: A classic suggestion for cheesy horror. Its title alone makes it a memorable and frequently recommended 'so bad it's good' film.

ranked_movies.title: Event Horizon
ranked_movies.reason: Named as a favorite, with a user expressing hope that lost footage from the film would one day be found, indicating its cult status and impact.

ranked_movies.title: The Exorcist
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a favorite that holds up decades later, still managing to scare viewers and be considered one of the best.

ranked_movies.title: 30 Days of Night
ranked_movies.reason: Chosen as a user's 'Day 1' horror movie for its eerie, brutal, and menacing take on vampires. The 'No God' scene was specifically mentioned as chilling.
